name: Tuna Shrimp Delight
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Can cream of mushroom soup
8 oz Can pitted black olives, drained and sliced in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first four ingredients in a shallow, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole. Pour the sherry over the ingredients and mix gently.
2. Arrange the asparagus spears over the mixture and heat in the Microwave Oven for 8 minutes or until the mixture bubbles.
3. Cut the conventionally toasted bread into 9 squares per slice. Arrange the toast squares on top of the casserole filling during the last 30 seconds of cooking time.
